data.name: Subtitle
data.value: Learn about our history, mission, and purpose.

data.name: Description
data.value: We are part of the Seventh-day Adventist Church, a worldwide Christian movement that proclaims the everlasting gospel and the hope of Jesus’ soon return.

data.name: MissionText
data.value: To proclaim the everlasting gospel to every nation, tribe, language, and people, leading others to accept Jesus as their personal Savior and preparing them for His soon return.

data.name: VisionText
data.value: To live and share the love of Christ, reflecting hope, service, and faith as we await the glorious return of Jesus.

data.name: PurposeText
data.value: To inspire every person to build a relationship with God, grow together in faith, and serve others with love and compassion.

data.name: HistoryIntro
data.value: The Seventh-day Adventist Church was officially organized in 1863. Since then, it has grown around the world, bringing hope, education, health, and service to millions of people.

data.name: History1863
data.value: Official organization of the Seventh-day Adventist Church on May 21, 1863.

data.name: GrowthText
data.value: Today, we are present in more than 200 countries and territories with more than 21 million members.

data.name: ServiceText
data.value: Through education, health, humanitarian assistance, and Christian service, we bring hope to others.

data.name: WorldMissionText
data.value: To proclaim the everlasting gospel to the whole world and prepare a people for the soon return of Jesus.

data.name: BeliefsIntro
data.value: As a church, we accept the 28 fundamental beliefs found in the Bible. Among them:

data.name: BeliefSanctuary
data.value: Christ’s ministry in the heavenly sanctuary
